validation.temporal_validation: 80/20 chronological split (skipped in artifact for top 5; logged in pipeline)

calibration.method: Calibration curves + Brier scores for top 5

dca.clinical_utility: Model net benefit exceeds treat-none and treat-all for substantial threshold windows (notably around 0.05-0.60 for top models).

validation.multiple_comparison: Pairwise AUC differences across 16 models with correction
validation.confusion_matrices: Available as PNG figures (LightGBM, GB, XGB, CatBoost, Stacking)
